command: In the Maestro app, start Auto Run for these 3 agents one at a time: 1) Click 'Clawwork Dashboard' in the left sidebar. Click the panel toggle icon top right. Click 'Auto Run' tab. Click 'Run' button. Click 'Go' in the dialog. Wait 3 seconds. 2) Click 'Magic Puffs' in the left sidebar. Click the panel toggle icon top right. Click 'Auto Run' tab. Click 'Run' button. Click 'Go' in the dialog. Wait 3 seconds. 3) Click 'Noise Agency' in the left sidebar. Click the panel toggle icon top right. Click 'Auto Run' tab. Click 'Run' button. Click 'Go' in the dialog.
